'''faduyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rzehakinid|rzehakinid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rzehakinid|rzehakinid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| faduyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædiyith|fædiyith]] || [[word:fædiyij|fædiyij]] || [[word:fædiyish|fædiyish]] || [[word:fædiyi|fædiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:faduduyuth|faduduyuth]] || [[word:faduduyuj|faduduyuj]] || [[word:faduduyush|faduduyush]] || [[word:faduduyu|faduduyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:faduyuth|faduyuth]] || [[word:faduyuj|faduyuj]] || [[word:faduyush|faduyush]] || [[word:faduyu|faduyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadufyuth|fadufyuth]] || [[word:fadufyuj|fadufyuj]] || [[word:fadufyush|fadufyush]] || [[word:fadufyuf|fadufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:faduyuthu|faduyuthu]] || [[word:faduyuju|faduyuju]] || [[word:faduyushu|faduyushu]] || [[word:faduyuku|faduyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:faduyuth|faduyuth]] || [[word:faduyuj|faduyuj]] || [[word:faduyush|faduyush]] || [[word:faduyu|faduyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:faduyuthul|faduyuthul]] || [[word:faduyujul|faduyujul]] || [[word:faduyushul|faduyushul]] || [[word:faduyukul|faduyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:faduyuthuthu|faduyuthuthu]] || [[word:faduyujuju|faduyujuju]] || [[word:faduyushushu|faduyushushu]] || [[word:faduyuku|faduyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:faduyuthun|faduyuthun]] || [[word:faduyujun|faduyujun]] || [[word:faduyushun|faduyushun]] || [[word:faduyukun|faduyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:faduyuthuoro|faduyuthuoro]] || [[word:faduyujuoro|faduyujuoro]] || [[word:faduyushuoro|faduyushuoro]] || [[word:faduyukuoro|faduyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
